adi.name: Adi
adi.message: From spontaneous plans to lifelong memories — twenty-five years of Dada would not shine half as bright without you in the frame.

priya.name: Priya
priya.message: Some people feel like family the moment they arrive. Dada's silver year simply isn't complete unless you're standing right beside him.

khyati.name: Khyati
khyati.message: Twenty-five years, and the stories with you in them are still his favourite ones to tell. Come write the next chapter.

raji.name: Raji
raji.message: Twenty-five years, and the stories with you in them are still his favourite ones to tell. Come write the next chapter.
